message: feat: bootstrap the speech model at app startup

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class AppControllerTests: XCTestCase {
+    @MainActor
+    func testStartLoadsConfiguredSpeechModelAndTransitionsToReady() async {
+        let settings = SettingsStore(userDefaults: makeUserDefaults())
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(controller.status, .ready)
+        XCTAssertEqual(loader.calls, ["isCached:openai_whisper-small.en", "load:openai_whisper-small.en"])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testStartSurfacesSpeechModelLoadFailureAsError() async {
+        let settings = SettingsStore(userDefaults: makeUserDefaults())
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        loader.loadError = NSError(domain: "AppControllerTests", code: 1, userInfo: [
+            NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Model load failed."
+        ])
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(controller.status, .error("Model load failed."))
+    }
+
+    private func makeUserDefaults() -> UserDefaults {
+        let suiteName = "AppControllerTests-\(UUID().uuidString)"
+        let userDefaults = UserDefaults(suiteName: suiteName)!
+        userDefaults.removePersistentDomain(forName: suiteName)
+        addTeardownBlock {
+            UserDefaults(suiteName: suiteName)?.removePersistentDomain(forName: suiteName)
+        }
+        return userDefaults
+    }
+}
+
+private final class AppControllerSpeechModelLoader: SpeechModelLoading {
+    var cachedModelIDs: Set<String> = []
+    var calls: [String] = []
+    var loadError: Error?
+
+    func isCached(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor) async throws -> Bool {
+        calls.append("isCached:\(model.id)")
+        return cachedModelIDs.contains(model.id)
+    }
+
+    func download(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor, progress: @escaping @Sendable (Double) -> Void) async throws {
+        calls.append("download:\(model.id)")
+        progress(1.0)
+    }
+
+    func load(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor, whisperOptions: WhisperRuntimeOptions) async throws {
+        calls.append("load:\(model.id)")
+        if let loadError {
+            throw loadError
+        }
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,149 @@
+import Foundation
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class WhisperSpeechModelLoaderTests: XCTestCase {
+    @MainActor
+    func testIsCachedChecksCanonicalApplicationSupportPath() async throws {
+        let fileManager = FileManager.default
+        let rootURL = try makeTemporaryDirectory()
+        let cacheURL = rootURL
+            .appending(path: "models", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+            .appending(path: "openai", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+            .appending(path: "whisper-small.en", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+        try fileManager.createDirectory(at: cacheURL, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
+
+        let loader = WhisperSpeechModelLoader(
+            runtime: FakeWhisperRuntime(),
+            fileManager: fileManager,
+            whisperModelsRootURL: rootURL
+        )
+
+        let cached = try await loader.isCached(.whisperSmallEnglish)
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(cached)
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testDownloadMovesTheModelIntoTheCanonicalCachePath() async throws {
+        let fileManager = FileManager.default
+        let rootURL = try makeTemporaryDirectory()
+        let downloadedURL = rootURL
+            .appending(path: "downloads", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+            .appending(path: "openai", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+            .appending(path: "whisper-small.en", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+        try fileManager.createDirectory(at: downloadedURL, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
+        try Data("model".utf8).write(to: downloadedURL.appending(path: "AudioEncoder.mlmodelc"))
+
+        let runtime = FakeWhisperRuntime()
+        runtime.downloadedURL = downloadedURL
+        let loader = WhisperSpeechModelLoader(
+            runtime: runtime,
+            fileManager: fileManager,
+            whisperModelsRootURL: rootURL
+        )
+
+        let reportedProgress = ProgressRecorder()
+        try await loader.download(.whisperSmallEnglish) { progress in
+            reportedProgress.record(progress)
+        }
+
+        let expectedURL = rootURL
+            .appending(path: "models", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+            .appending(path: "openai", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+            .appending(path: "whisper-small.en", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(runtime.downloadedVariants, ["small.en"])
+        XCTAssertEqual(reportedProgress.snapshot(), [0.25, 1.0])
+        XCTAssertTrue(fileManager.fileExists(atPath: expectedURL.path))
+        XCTAssertFalse(fileManager.fileExists(atPath: downloadedURL.path))
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testLoadInitializesTheRuntimeWithTheCanonicalModelFolderAndRequiredOptions() async throws {
+        let fileManager = FileManager.default
+        let rootURL = try makeTemporaryDirectory()
+        let cacheURL = rootURL
+            .appending(path: "models", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+            .appending(path: "openai", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+            .appending(path: "whisper-small.en", directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+        try fileManager.createDirectory(at: cacheURL, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
+
+        let runtime = FakeWhisperRuntime()
+        let loader = WhisperSpeechModelLoader(
+            runtime: runtime,
+            fileManager: fileManager,
+            whisperModelsRootURL: rootURL
+        )
+
+        try await loader.load(
+            .whisperSmallEnglish,
+            whisperOptions: WhisperRuntimeOptions(
+                verbose: false,
+                logLevel: .errorOnly,
+                prewarm: false,
+                load: true
+            )
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(runtime.initializationRequests, [
+            WhisperInitializationRequest(
+                variant: "small.en",
+                modelFolderURL: cacheURL,
+                verbose: false,
+                logLevel: .errorOnly,
+                prewarm: false,
+                load: true
+            )
+        ])
+    }
+
+    private func makeTemporaryDirectory() throws -> URL {
+        let url = FileManager.default.temporaryDirectory
+            .appending(path: UUID().uuidString, directoryHint: .isDirectory)
+        try FileManager.default.createDirectory(at: url, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
+        addTeardownBlock {
+            try? FileManager.default.removeItem(at: url)
+        }
+        return url
+    }
+}
+
+private final class FakeWhisperRuntime: WhisperRuntimeLoading, @unchecked Sendable {
+    var downloadedURL: URL?
+    var downloadedVariants: [String] = []
+    var initializationRequests: [WhisperInitializationRequest] = []
+
+    func download(
+        variant: String,
+        downloadBase: URL,
+        progress: @escaping @Sendable (Double) -> Void
+    ) async throws -> URL {
+        downloadedVariants.append(variant)
+        progress(0.25)
+        progress(1.0)
+        return downloadedURL ?? downloadBase
+    }
+
+    func initialize(_ request: WhisperInitializationRequest) async throws {
+        initializationRequests.append(request)
+    }
+}
+
+private final class ProgressRecorder: @unchecked Sendable {
+    private let lock = NSLock()
+    private var values: [Double] = []
+
+    func record(_ value: Double) {
+        lock.lock()
+        values.append(value)
+        lock.unlock()
+    }
+
+    func snapshot() -> [Double] {
+        lock.lock()
+        let snapshot = values
+        lock.unlock()
+        return snapshot
+    }
+}
